scenarios.title: I'm a developer getting started with AI coding agents
scenarios.description: You want to add an AI coding agent to your workflow but aren't sure where to start or what's out there.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.role: The gold standard. Best quality output if you're willing to pay for Anthropic's API.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.role: Leading open-source alternative. Provider-agnostic — use Claude, GPT, Gemini, or local models.

tools.name: Pi Agent
tools.role: Comprehensive toolkit if you want full control over the stack. Deliberately minimal, extend what you need.

tools.name: Codebuff
tools.role: Indie alternative optimized for Opus models. Clean interface, strong benchmarks.

scenarios.title: I already use a coding agent and want to level it up
scenarios.description: You're using Claude Code or OpenCode but want better results, design quality, or project management from your agent.

tools.name: everything-claude-code
tools.role: Config/skills layer — adds TDD, security scanning, and memory to Claude Code or OpenCode.

tools.name: oh-my-openagent (omo)
tools.role: Multi-model orchestration layer with 10 specialist agents. Adds parallel execution and intent analysis.

tools.name: GSD (Get Shit Done)
tools.role: Meta-prompting system with 40+ slash commands. Prevents context rot on large projects.

tools.name: Impeccable
tools.role: Design skill that gives your agent design fluency. 20 slash commands for UI quality.

tools.name: Skills CLI
tools.role: Package manager for agent skills. Install specialized knowledge across 40+ agents.

tools.name: Bridle
tools.role: Unified config manager if you use multiple harnesses. Switch profiles, install skills from one TUI.

scenarios.title: I'm building a product that uses AI agents
scenarios.description: You're adding agentic capabilities to your SaaS, app, or platform — not just using agents for coding, but shipping agents as a feature.

tools.name: Mastra
tools.role: TypeScript-native framework. Great for Next.js/React apps. Memory, workflows, MCP authoring, 90+ providers.

tools.name: LangGraph
tools.role: Production-grade Python framework for complex stateful agent workflows. Go-to for backend-heavy apps.

tools.name: Open Harness (MaxGfeller)
tools.role: TypeScript library of harness primitives you can embed directly in your app via Vercel AI SDK.

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.role: Role-based multi-agent framework. Good for team-like workflows where agents have defined responsibilities.

tools.name: Dify
tools.role: Visual no-code platform for building agent workflows. Fastest path to a working prototype.

scenarios.title: I need to run multiple coding agents in parallel
scenarios.description: Your work is complex enough that one agent isn't enough. You want to orchestrate several agents working on different parts simultaneously.

tools.name: Superset
tools.role: Desktop IDE for parallel agents. Git worktree isolation per agent, unified dashboard, diff viewer.

tools.name: Claude Code Agent Teams
tools.role: Native multi-instance coordination built into Claude Code. Shared task list, mailbox messaging.

tools.name: Emdash
tools.role: Parallel-agent orchestrator with git worktree isolation. Runs 10+ coding agents simultaneously.

tools.name: Composio Agent Orchestrator
tools.role: Plans tasks and spawns parallel coding agents to handle complex multi-file work.

tools.name: T3 Code
tools.role: GUI shell that wraps coding agents with visual project management and git worktree support.

scenarios.title: I want to explore fully autonomous agent operations
scenarios.description: You're interested in agents that run without human oversight — autonomous companies, persistent agents, or self-improving systems.

tools.name: Hermes Agent
tools.role: Self-improving persistent agent. Runs on a VPS, reachable via Telegram/Discord/Slack. Learns from experience.

tools.name: Paperclip.ing
tools.role: Dashboard that turns agents into an org structure. Org charts, budgets, governance, task routing.

tools.name: MetaGPT
tools.role: AI software company simulator with defined roles (CEO, CTO, engineers). End-to-end project generation.

tools.name: Trinity
tools.role: Docker-isolated sovereign agent fleet. Fleet scheduling, audit trails, real-time observability.

tools.name: SuperAGI
tools.role: Long-running autonomous agent platform. Persistent workflows, task delegation, scalable.

scenarios.title: I'm not a developer but want to use AI agents
scenarios.description: You want to automate business workflows with AI but don't write code. You need tools that work with natural language.

tools.name: Twin
tools.role: No-code agent builder. Describe what you want in natural language, Twin builds and runs it. 2,700+ app integrations.

tools.name: Dify
tools.role: Visual drag-and-drop agent workflow builder. No coding required for basic automations.

tools.name: ChatDev
tools.role: Virtual software company. Describe a software project and watch agent teams build it.
